title: 理事長代理との出会い

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day during training, I encounter a woman I've
never met before. She rather harshly berates me
for being too lax in my training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She then calmly proceeds to criticize the academy
for overvaluing its students' independence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gesturing to a lush forest in the distance, she
asserts that athletes, just like forests, must be
carefully managed in order to thrive.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Only then do I learn that this harsh critic is none
other than Riko Kashimoto, our new temporary
director.
